steps.title: Look for ambivalence
steps.content: The claim requires both displeasure toward poetry and acknowledgment of its merit. The strongest support must show those opposing attitudes together in one quotation.

steps.title: Find both attitudes
steps.content: A defends nonliterary documents, B criticizes half poets, and C focuses on unintelligibility. Only the remaining quotation pairs contempt with finding a place for the genuine. The answer is D.
